teamHalfSeasonRankQuartileLowest.row_predicate: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" <= 1) OR (rowid IN (3,4,12,15,35)))

teamHalfSeasonRankQuartileLowerMiddle.row_predicate: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" > 1 AND "rank" <= 2) OR (rowid IN (13,20,23,41)))

teamHalfSeasonRankQuartileUpperMiddle.row_predicate: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" > 2 AND "rank" <= 3) OR (rowid IN (8,21,26,33)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where year > 2001 or is NULL
rows where year > 1990 or is NULL
rows where g > 80 or is NULL
rows where ENG = 2 + rows where ENG = 3
rows where ENG = 4 + rows where ENG = 5 + rows where ENG = 6 + rows where ENG = 7 + rows where ENG = 8
rows where ENG is NULL or not in {'0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
rows where hL > 16 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: (("L" IS NOT NULL AND "L" > 1 AND "L" <= 1) OR ("L" IS NOT NULL AND "L" > 1 AND "L" <= 2))
fragment_roles: rows where 1 < L <= 1 + rows where 1 < L <= 2
rows where L > 2 or is NULL
TeamVsTeam||vfrag=frag_52440.fragment_role_B: rows where 1 < L <= 1 + rows where 1 < L <= 2

base_predicate_sqls: (("G" IS NOT NULL AND "G" > 80 AND "G" <= 82) OR ("G" > 82 OR "G" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 80 < G <= 82 + rows where G > 82 or is NULL

predicate_sqls: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" <= 1) OR (rowid IN (3,4,12,15,35)))
(("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" > 1 AND "rank" <= 2) OR (rowid IN (13,20,23,41)))
(("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" > 2 AND "rank" <= 3) OR (rowid IN (8,21,26,33)))
fragment_roles: rows where rank > 3 or is NULL
TeamsHalf||vfrag=frag_5951.predicate_sql_fragment_A: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" <= 1) OR (rowid IN (3,4,12,15,35)))
TeamsHalf||vfrag=frag_5951.predicate_sql_fragment_B: (("rank" IS NOT NULL AND "rank" > 1 AND "rank" <= 2) OR (rowid IN (13,20,23,41)))

fragment_roles: rows where GA > 34 or is NULL
rows where pos = G + rows where pos = LW + rows where pos = F
rows where pos = C + rows where pos = RW
rows where pos = W or is NULL
AwardsPlayers||vfrag=lgid.fragment_role_B: rows where pos = G + rows where pos = LW + rows where pos = F

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
